zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：震荡偏强的高位整理结构
zh.content:
当前市场维持震荡偏强格局，价格81.55小幅回落0.89%，仍运行于20日均线上方，短期多头结构未破，整体进入高位整理阶段。

MACD柱值1.36814显示动能仍在正区，但信号线缺失，需谨慎判断背离风险。SMA20为78.51提供支撑确认，多头均线结构延续。

下方关注81.30短线支撑与80整数关口，上方82.36为日内阻力密集区。若跌破则回测78.5均线区域支撑力度增强需观察量能配合。

操作建议以区间低吸为主，突破82.36可轻仓追多，若失守81.30则观望或减仓。严格止损控制风险结构保持纪律交易避免追涨杀跌。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana is trading at **81.55**, remaining above its **20-day simple moving average of 78.514**, which suggests the broader short-term trend continues to favor buyers despite the modest **0.89%** daily decline. Price action has stayed within a relatively tight intraday range between **81.33** and **82.36**, indicating consolidation rather than aggressive selling. As long as the market maintains closes above the moving average, the prevailing structure points to underlying strength with limited short-term downside pressure.

Momentum signals offer a mixed but generally constructive picture. The available **MACD reading of 1.36814** remains positive, implying bullish momentum has not fully faded even though recent gains have slowed. The absence of RSI and signal-line data limits confirmation of momentum strength or potential overbought conditions, so traders should avoid relying on a single indicator. Instead, monitoring price behavior around key technical levels can provide stronger evidence of whether buyers are preparing for another advance or losing control.

The immediate support zone is near the session low around **81.33**, with stronger technical support developing closer to the **20-day SMA at 78.51**. Holding above these levels would preserve the current bullish bias. On the upside, the recent high near **82.36** represents the first resistance. A convincing breakout above that area could attract additional buying interest and create room for an extension toward higher resistance levels, while repeated rejection there may encourage short-term profit-taking.

For active traders, patience is appropriate until price either confirms a breakout above resistance or produces a controlled pullback toward support. Bullish positions generally become more attractive on sustained strength above **82.36** with increasing volume, while entries near support may offer favorable risk-to-reward if buying interest reappears. Conversely, a decisive break below the **20-day SMA** would weaken the current technical outlook and suggest adopting a more defensive stance until momentum stabilizes again.
